title: Mediterranean Marinated Tofu
summary: This Mediterranean marinated tofu is a great way to easily sneak in some extra protein. It’s zingy and herby and makes a great swap for feta.

ingredients.label: 400g Firm Tofu (The Kind That’s Packaged In a Tub Of Water)
ingredients.name: Firm Tofu

ingredients.label: 400g Firm Tofu (The Kind That’s Packaged In a Tub Of Water)
ingredients.name: Tofu

ingredients.label: 1 Tbsp Mixed Dried Herbs (Oregano, Basil, Thyme, Rosemary)
ingredients.name: Dried Mixed Herbs

method.description: Pat the tofu dry with a clean kitchen towel.
Crumble or cube the tofu and add it into a clean jar.
Add the rest of the ingredients to the jar and give it a good shake.
You can eat immediately, but the tofu will be marinated after a couple of hours and will continue to develop in flavour.
Keep in the fridge for up to 7 days. If the olive oil becomes solid in the fridge, just let it come back to room temperature before serving or add a splash of boiling water to the jar and mix.

chefs.name: Christina Soteriou
chefs.summary: Christina (@christinasots) is a plant-based chef and recipe developer with a love for the Mediterranean flavours of her home, Cyprus. With an equal balance of healthy, flavourful and easy to make, there are no compromises here!
